blockingIssues.description: sd-core/src/horizon.rs:230 DateTime urgency semantics mismatch: instant horizon can return 0.0 even though method contract expects >= 1.0.
sd-core/src/horizon.rs:155 range_start/range_end use expect() with publicly constructible Horizon variants, allowing panic on invalid values (e.g., Month(2026,13)).
sd-core/src/dynamics.rs:901 detect_horizon_drift misclassifies first-time horizon assignment as Postponement because all() on empty shifts returns true.
sd-core/src/dynamics.rs:1126 detect_oscillation counts horizon mutations even when horizon input is None, violating horizon=None regression safety.
sd-core/src/dynamics.rs:1823 compensating-strategy persistence scaling direction conflicts with expected behavior (2-week oscillation should be significant for Month but not Year).
sd-core/src/tree.rs:431 children_by_horizon signature returns Option<Vec<&Node>> instead of contract-specified Vec<&Node>.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align procedure expectations and enforcement for 'followedProcedure': require explicit evidence for tests-first and required cargo doc/manual verification, or make those steps optional in the skill.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: 8 reviewed rust-library-worker features reported followedProcedure=true while review evidence repeatedly showed no cargo doc execution and inconsistent tests-first sequencing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify precedence rule when feature/spec API signatures diverge from existing module conventions (e.g., Option-returning tree queries vs newly specified Vec-returning API).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: horizon-tree implemented Option<Vec<&Node>> in line with existing tree API patterns, but feature/spec expected Vec<&Node>, creating a contract mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update persistent schema notes to include tensions.horizon TEXT column and current horizon-related data model invariants.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: horizon-store added horizon TEXT in schema, but shared architecture reference still lists the old tensions columns.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated cargo doc / followedProcedure mismatch observations from individual feature reviews.
No-panics convention violation observation from horizon-type shared-state notes.
rejectedObservations.reason: already captured as concrete blocking code issue in this synthesis
